text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One evening...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I come across Mejiro McQueen studying in the cafeteria late at night.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: So if I were to substitute this formula here... That makes sense.
choice_data_list: Do you have a test coming up?
Do you have a test coming up?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer! Yes, there's a short quiz tomorrow. I thought that I would
conduct a quick review.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I was having a few difficulties, however, which is why I'm still here.
choice_data_list:
Maybe we should reduce the training load
tomorrow?

Maybe we should reduce the training load
tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, there's no need to do that. As a Mejiro, I am accustomed to
balancing both mental and physical discipline.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Therefore, I expect the standard regimen at practice tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As requested, we conduct our training regimen as usual the next day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No doubt due to how late she was up studying last night, McQueen
begins to nod off during our post-training meeting.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Eek!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
O-of course I am! A Mejiro brings nothing but her full attention to
every interaction!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: We were reviewing all of today's training exercises, yes?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Given her condition, I decide it would be best to start things over one
more time. But...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
choice_data_list: You didn't get enough sleep, did you?
You didn't get enough sleep, did you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I-I really wasn't sleeping, dozing, or even dreaming! It must be your
imagination.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Please continue. I'm all ears.
choice_data_list: Let's go ahead and call it a day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Huh? But we were in the middle of a meeting...
choice_data_list:
I don't want to push you to the point of
collapsing again.

I don't want to push you to the point of
collapsing again.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh... but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: It looks like I've exhibited cause for concern once again.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to cause you any more undue trouble, so let's wrap it up
for today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Thank you as always, Trainer.
choice_data_list: Just be sure to sleep properly, okay?
Just be sure to sleep properly, okay?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'll have you know that I am managing my sleep schedule perfectly
fine!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: AND I was actually paying proper attention back there!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I must ask that you believe me! I insist!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems much work remains to be done to persuade the prideful
McQueen to acknowledge her limits.
